series_metadata.series_title: ADA Accommodation Requests under Title II (Participants in ODOT programs, activities, services)
series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of records maintained by ODOT for ADA accommodation requests under Title II made by participants in ODOT programs, activities, or services.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper until scanned electronically then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic records for seven (7) years from the date a determination for accommodation is made, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
